goal: Define content/cards as the single card-catalog source, batch migrate legacy cards from showcase/cardsDB into content/cards as planned, and make collection UI default to active while rendering non-active cards as locked/grey.
constraints: Do not delete card assets; migrate and downgrade by status.
Keep runtime/gameplay card consumption on active cards only.
Preserve minimal, reviewable diffs in existing architecture.
deliverables: Legacy cards from src/data/showcaseCards.ts and src/data/cardsDB.json migrated into content/cards with status planned.
src/data/cardsSource.ts no longer depends on showcase/cardsDB as active source.
Collection UI defaults to active cards and presents non-active cards as grey/locked with '未开放' labeling.
Validation/build scripts aligned with status-based lifecycle handling.
